think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all time intervals where the batter wearing jersey #33 is visible in the video.

1.  **Analyze the Request:**
    *   **Target:** Batter wearing jersey #33 (José Cardona).
    *   **Condition:** Visible (partial, full, obscured, wide shots).
    *   **Segmentation:** Treat zoom transitions as segment boundaries.
    *   **Output Format:** JSON.

2.  **Scan the Video for #33:**
    *   **01:09 - 01:12:** Wide shot of the pitcher and batter. Batter is #33.
    *   **01:13 - 01:20:** Close-up of batter #33 at the plate.
    *   **01:21 - 01:23:** Wide shot of pitcher throwing to batter #33.
    *   **01:32 - 01:37:** Wide shot of pitcher throwing to batter #33.
    *   **01:38 - 01:42:** Close-up of batter #33 walking back to the plate.
    *   **01:43 - 01:47:** Very wide shot of the field, batter #33 is visible at home plate.
    *   **01:48 - 01:59:** Wide shot of pitcher throwing to batter #33.
    *   **02:04 - 02:11:** Wide shot of pitcher, batter #33 is visible on the right side of the frame.
    *   **02:12 - 02:15:** Wide shot of pitcher throwing to batter #33.
    *   **02:16 - 02:20:** Wide shot of the field, batter #33 hits the ball and runs.
    *   **02:21 - 02:26:** Batter #33 running to first base and standing on it.
    *   **02:27 - 02:29:** Shot of first baseman, batter #33 is not in frame.
    *   **02:30 - 02:32:** Batter #33 standing on first base with coach.
    *   **02:35 - 02:38:** Close-up of batter #33 hitting the ball (replay).
    *   **02:39 - 02:41:** Wide shot of field, batter #33 running.
    *   **02:42 - 02:44:** Batter #33 running to first base (replay).
    *   **02:47 - 02:54:** Batter #33 standing on first base.
    *   **02:55 - 02:59:** Wide shot of pitcher throwing to batter #33.
    *   **03:00 - 03:02:** Wide shot of field, batter #33 hits the ball.
    *   **03:03 - 03:06:** Batter #33 running to first base.
    *   **03:17 - 03:24:** Close-up of batter #33 hitting the ball (replay).

3.  **Define Segments based on Zoom Transitions:**
    *   Segment 1: 01:09 - 01:12 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 2: 01:13 - 01:20 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 3: 01:21 - 01:23 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 4: 01:32 - 01:37 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 5: 01:38 - 01:42 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 6: 01:43 - 01:47 (Very wide shot)
    *   Segment 7: 01:48 - 01:59 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 8: 02:04 - 02:11 (Wide shot, pitcher focus but #33 visible)
    *   Segment 9: 02:12 - 02:15 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 10: 02:16 - 02:20 (Wide shot, action)
    *   Segment 11: 02:21 - 02:26 (Medium shot, running/standing)
    *   Segment 12: 02:30 - 02:32 (Medium shot, standing on base)
    *   Segment 13: 02:35 - 02:38 (Close-up, replay)
    *   Segment 14: 02:39 - 02:41 (Wide shot, replay)
    *   Segment 15: 02:42 - 02:44 (Medium shot, running)
    *   Segment 16: 02:47 - 02:54 (Medium shot, standing on base)
    *   Segment 17: 02:55 - 02:59 (Wide shot)
    *   Segment 18: 03:00 - 03:02 (Wide shot, action)
    *   Segment 19: 03:03 - 03:06 (Medium shot, running)
    *   Segment 20: 03:17 - 03:24 (Close-up, replay)

4.  **Refine Timestamps and Descriptions:**
    *   01:09 - 01:12: Visible in wide shot.
    *   01:13 - 01:20: Visible in close-up.
    *   01:21 - 01:23: Visible in wide shot.
    *   01:32 - 01:37: Visible in wide shot.
    *   01:38 - 01:42: Visible in close-up.
    *   01:43 - 01:47: Visible in very wide shot.
    *   01:48 - 01:59: Visible in wide shot.
    *   02:04 - 02:11: Visible in wide shot (right side).
    *   02:12 - 02:15: Visible in wide shot.
    *   02:16 - 02:20: Visible in wide shot.
    *   02:21 - 02:26: Visible in medium shot.
    *   02:30 - 02:32: Visible in medium shot.
    *   02:35 - 02:38: Visible in close-up.
    *   02:39 - 02:41: Visible in wide shot.
    *   02:42 - 02:44: Visible in medium shot.
    *   02:47 - 02:54: Visible in medium shot.
    *   02:55 - 02:59: Visible in wide shot.
    *   03:00 - 03:02: Visible in wide shot.
    *   03:03 - 03:06: Visible in medium shot.
    *   03:17 - 03:24: Visible in close-up.

5.  **Final Review:** The timestamps align with the visual presence of player #33. The segmentation follows camera cuts/zooms.
